title: garnotia st-johnii
intro: Garnotia st-johnii, also known as 'St. John's Wort', is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and India, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and mild depression due to its antidepressant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Garnotia st-johnii include its ability to reduce stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS. Herbal preparations of Garnotia st-johnii include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support mental health and promote relaxation.
